name: Mind
tagline: Charm, compel, and read the thoughts of others.

baseAbility.name: Charm
baseAbility.description: Standard action, close range, ranged touch attack (or touch for some options), 0-1 SP. Place a charm effect on a creature from a (charm) talent you know, at lesser/greater/powerful strength depending on talents; a Will save usually applies to unwilling targets. You start with one (charm) talent of your choice (e.g. Communication for telepathic messaging, or Enthrall to make the target regard you as a friend).

talents.name: Enthrall (charm)
talents.description: New charm: make the target regard you progressively better, up to becoming docile and obedient at its strongest tier.

talents.name: Communication (charm)
talents.description: New charm: send a short telepathic message, escalating to full two-way telepathic conversation at higher tiers.

talents.name: Suggestion (charm)
talents.description: New charm: plant a reasonable-sounding suggestion the target is compelled to follow.

talents.name: Rumor (charm)
talents.description: New charm: implant a false memory or belief in the target's mind.

talents.name: Candor (charm)
talents.description: New charm: compel the target toward honesty, up to forcing a direct truthful answer to one question.

talents.name: Cerebral Strike (charm)
talents.description: New charm: a direct mental attack dealing nonlethal damage on a failed save.

talents.name: Read Emotion (charm)
talents.description: New charm: sense a target's emotional state, escalating to reading surface thoughts or pulling specific facts at higher tiers.

talents.name: Hostility / Calm (charm)
talents.description: New charm: shift a target's disposition toward or away from hostility.

talents.name: Mass Charm
talents.description: Apply the same charm to 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) at once.
